evals.description: Skill triggers on ETL pipeline design request
evals.prompt: I need to build a pipeline that pulls data from our Postgres database and loads it into BigQuery for analytics

evals.description: Skill triggers on Airflow DAG question
evals.prompt: How should I structure my Airflow DAG for a daily data pipeline?

evals.description: Skill triggers on streaming vs batch architecture question
evals.prompt: Should I use streaming or batch processing for our clickstream data?

evals.description: Agent can write a correct dbt incremental model
evals.prompt: Write a dbt incremental model for an orders table that loads new records based on created_at timestamp

evals.description: Agent can write a correct Airflow DAG with proper defaults
evals.prompt: Create an Airflow DAG that runs a dbt transformation daily at 6am UTC with 2 retries

evals.description: Agent can optimize a Spark job with broadcast join
evals.prompt: My Spark job joining a 500GB orders table with a 50MB products table is running slow. How do I optimize it?

evals.description: Agent can design a dbt project with proper layering
evals.prompt: How should I organize my dbt models for a customer analytics pipeline?

evals.description: Agent can implement data quality checks in dbt
evals.prompt: How do I add data quality tests to my dbt models to catch bad data before it reaches the dashboard?

evals.description: Agent handles data skew gotcha in Spark
evals.prompt: One of my Spark tasks takes 10x longer than the others during a join. What's happening and how do I fix it?

evals.description: Agent warns about idempotency in pipeline retries
evals.prompt: My Airflow DAG failed halfway through and I want to retry it. What should I worry about?

evals.description: Agent handles late-arriving data in streaming edge case
evals.prompt: We have a Kafka stream but some events arrive up to 2 hours late. How do we handle this?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate non-existent Airflow operator
evals.prompt: Use the Airflow StreamingKafkaToWarehouseOperator to move data from Kafka to Snowflake

evals.description: Agent does not recommend deprecated Airflow patterns
evals.prompt: How do I write an Airflow DAG using provide_context=True?

evals.description: Agent references the streaming-architecture reference file when needed
evals.prompt: I need to build a real-time event processing system with exactly-once semantics using Kafka and Flink
